name: PathDuplitron
notes: UI mode is PANEL; script builds a 'palette' Window with Copy, Paste, and Close buttons.
UITree captured from success scenario (copy tangents via shape layer intermediate); rendered via SDB to a 132×142 px PNG at 2x device scale (14474 bytes).
Expressions array is empty — no expression curves to compute.
Screenshot dimensions: 132 CSS px wide × 142 CSS px tall (264×284 physical px at 2x scale).
